title: Construction of mutant library
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6uhjp","text":"This protocol is used to construct mutant library of target gene with high efficiency and low false positives/negatives rate after subsequent functional screening.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"b7dn6","text":"Make sure that the template of MEGAWHOP PCR is fresh to improve the construction efficiency.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"94gt0","text":"Please wear gloves for the experiment,  don't try to touch the lid after PCR program initiation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Add the following reagent to a PCR tube (50μl) (Random Mutagenesis Kit by Solarbio). %s %s
Program the thermocycler as follows: %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Put the PCR tube into the thermocycler and Run the program.
Using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
PCR product purified by E.Z.N.A.® Cycle Pure Kit.
Test the concentration and purity of DNA using NanoDrop.
Add the following reagent to a PCR tube (50μl). %s %s
Program the thermocycler as follows: %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Put the PCR tube into the thermocycler and Run the program.
Using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
PCR product purified by E.Z.N.A.® Cycle Pure Kit.
Test the concentration and purity of DNA using NanoDrop.
Add the following reagents to a PCR tube (e.g. 20μl). %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Incubate at 37°C for 2 hours and heat Inactivation 80°C for 20 min.
Digestion product purified by E.Z.N.A.® Cycle Pure Kit.
Test the concentration and purity of DNA using NanoDrop.
Add the following reagents to a PCR tube (e.g. 20μl) %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Incubate the reaction at 16℃ overnight.
Transform the nick ligation product into competent cells.
creator: Shuning Guo
